stocks.ai_explanation: NVIDIA is a leading provider of graphics processing units (GPUs), which are essential components for AI computing. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Microsoft is a global technology giant known for its Windows operating system and Office productivity suite. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Google is a multinational corporation that operates search engines, advertising platforms, and cloud services. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Amazon is a retail and e-commerce giant that also operates AWS, a cloud computing service. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Meta Platforms Inc., formerly Facebook, Inc., is a social media and internet platform. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
